records.description: TCP port already in use — set PORT=0 to let the OS assign a free port

reproduction.command: node -e "const net=require('net'); const s1=net.createServer(); s1.listen(0,()=>{const port=s1.address().port; const s2=net.createServer(); s2.on('error',e=>{console.error(e.message);s1.close();process.exit(1)}); s2.listen(port)})" 2>&1 || true
reproduction.fix_command: node -e "const net=require('net'); const s=net.createServer(); s.listen(0,()=>{console.log('listening on port '+s.address().port); s.close()})" 2>&1 || true
